phaseGoal: 为 Cross-Agent State Bridge v1 增加一组外部 agent proposal 样例，帮助操作者理解 safe / stale / conflicting / unsafe proposal 会如何被 Threadsmith review。
deliverable: proposal fixture pack、isolated smoke、operator docs update、truth closeout。
inScope: 新增 happy-path proposal fixture，预期 review 结果为 accept-plan
新增 stale proposal fixture，预期 review 结果为 needs-recovery
新增 wrong-phase/conflicting proposal fixture，预期 review 结果为 needs-recovery
新增 unsafe self-acceptance fixture，预期 schema/review 阶段拒绝
更新 Cross-Agent State Bridge v1 文档
outOfScope: 外部 agent 直接写 committed truth
stopCondition: 操作者能从 fixture pack 看懂外部 agent proposal 的正确形状，以及 Threadsmith 如何 accept-plan、needs-recovery 或拒绝不安全输入。
